metadata.stepBasis: controlled headless step equal to the in-game 12x four-substep update

default.label: 默认世界
default.description: 使用种子生成的默认世界，不进行任何玩家干预。

light-intervention.label: 轻度干预
light-intervention.description: 运行后在第10年补充一处草地、第12年投放3只食草兽、第24年投放1只猎食兽。

stress.label: 压力场景
stress.description: 时间开始前固定补充24处草地、12只食草兽和6只猎食兽，验证高密度投放后的长期结果。

metadata.baselineDefinition: Same runtime, seeds, scenarios and step size with Round 51 observation modules enabled.

balance.label: 食物网崩解
balance.advice: 植物仍然存在，但两级动物均已灭绝。

definitions.groupIdentity: maximum member-set overlap between consecutive observation samples
definitions.groupLifetimeYears: last observed year minus first observed year for an overlap-tracked group
definitions.membershipTurnover: symmetric member changes divided by prior observed member slots
definitions.averageMemberDistance: mean member distance from the observed group centroid across samples
definitions.stableGroup: lifetime >= 0.5 years and mean consecutive Jaccard >= 0.6
definitions.splitMergeEvent: member-set Jaccard overlap >= 0.2 with multiple groups
definitions.packHunt: hunt attempt by a hunter assigned to a pack of at least two at the attempt
definitions.noSampleValue: rates and distance/lifetime ratios are null when their denominator is zero
